items.name: UPenn CFP: Rhetoric and Composition
items.notes: Trusted structured category for rhetoric, composition, writing studies, pedagogy, and AI-related writing calls.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Film and Television
items.notes: Trusted structured category for film, television, cinema studies, media studies, and moving-image calls.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Humanities Computing and the Internet
items.notes: Trusted structured category for digital humanities, platforms, AI, internet studies, and computational culture.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Journals and Collections
items.notes: Trusted structured category for journal issues, edited collections, special issues, and publication calls.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Theory
items.notes: Trusted structured category for theory, philosophy-adjacent debates, critical theory, and conceptual work.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Pedagogy
items.notes: Trusted structured category for teaching, classroom practice, writing pedagogy, and graduate-student relevant calls.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Professional Topics
items.notes: Trusted structured category for professional communication, institutional practice, public humanities, and professionalization.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Graduate Conferences
items.notes: Trusted structured category for graduate conferences and early-career opportunities.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Cultural Studies
items.notes: Trusted structured category for cultural studies, media-adjacent humanities, and historical approaches.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Gender and Sexuality
items.notes: Trusted structured category for gender studies, sexuality studies, queer theory, identity, and embodiment.

items.name: UPenn CFP: Science and Culture
items.notes: Trusted structured category for science, technology, environment, culture, and STS-adjacent calls.

items.name: CFPList
items.notes: Broad humanities CFP source with useful deadline cues, but parsing is less stable, so items are treated as candidates unless clean.

items.name: CFPList: Rhetoric & Composition
items.notes: Focused CFPList category for rhetoric, composition, writing studies, writing pedagogy, and related publication calls.

items.name: CFPList: Digital Humanities
items.notes: Focused CFPList category for digital humanities, digital culture, platforms, AI-adjacent humanities, and computational methods.

items.name: CFPList: Film, TV & Media
items.notes: Focused CFPList category for film, television, media studies, moving-image culture, and screen studies calls.

items.name: CFPList: Philosophy
items.notes: Focused CFPList category for philosophy, critical theory, ethics, aesthetics, ontology, and theory-adjacent calls.

items.name: CFPList: Pedagogy
items.notes: Focused CFPList category for pedagogy, teaching, curriculum, writing instruction, classroom practice, and graduate-facing teaching calls.

items.name: CFPList: Graduate Conferences
items.notes: Focused CFPList category for graduate conferences, early-career CFPs, and student-friendly presentation opportunities.

items.name: CFPList: Technical Communication Search
items.notes: Keyword search for technical communication, technical writing, professional writing, documentation, UX, and adjacent calls.

items.name: CFPList: Professional Communication Search
items.notes: Keyword search for professional communication, workplace writing, organizational communication, and applied communication calls.

items.name: CFPList: Communication Studies Search
items.notes: Keyword search for communication studies, public communication, strategic communication, media communication, and communication theory calls.

items.name: CFPList: Information Design Search
items.notes: Keyword search for information design, communication design, data visualization, visual communication, and document design calls.

items.name: FilmFreeway Festivals
items.notes: Large festival source. Publish only when items match named high-signal festivals or experimental/media-art keywords cleanly.

items.name: NCA COMMNotes
items.notes: National Communication Association weekday newsletter for conferences, calls, announcements, participation requests, special issues, and field news in communication. Pending dedicated-inbox automation.

items.name: Ann Arbor Film Festival
items.notes: Official source for one of the key experimental film festivals to monitor for submission windows and program calls.

items.name: Media City Film Festival
items.notes: Official source for experimental film and media art festival announcements.

items.name: Images Festival
items.notes: Official source for moving-image, experimental media, and artist film opportunities.

items.name: Open City Documentary Festival
items.notes: Official source for documentary, essay film, and nonfiction moving-image opportunities.

items.name: Ars Electronica
items.notes: Official source for media art, digital art, art-and-technology calls, prizes, and festival opportunities.

items.name: e-flux Announcements
items.notes: Broad art-world announcement source for exhibitions, schools, public programs, media art, and publication-adjacent art calls.

items.name: Rhizome Opportunities
items.notes: Digital art and internet culture source to monitor for grants, commissions, exhibitions, digital art, and open calls.

items.name: NYFA Opportunities
items.notes: Broad artist opportunity source for grants, exhibitions, fellowships, film/video, digital media, and open calls.

items.name: H-Net Academic Announcements
items.notes: Broad humanities and social sciences announcement source for conferences, CFPs, programs, and scholarly events.

items.name: Creative West Opportunities
items.notes: Large art-opportunity directory with filters for exhibitions, grants, competitions, public art, film/video, and festivals.

items.name: National Endowment for the Humanities Grants
items.notes: Official humanities funding source for fellowships, digital projects, public humanities, preservation, and research grants.

items.name: ACLS Competitions and Deadlines
items.notes: Official humanities and humanistic social sciences fellowship and grant deadline list.

items.name: CLIR Programs and Grants
items.type: Digital humanities and preservation grant source
items.notes: Official source for digital library, dissertation, preservation, recordings-at-risk, and hidden-collections programs.

items.name: CCCC Annual Convention
items.notes: Official source for CCCC convention calls, deadlines, funding opportunities, and writing-studies conference information.

items.name: National Communication Association Convention
items.notes: Official NCA convention source to monitor for proposal cycles, acceptance notices, awards, and communication-studies opportunities.

items.name: Rhetoric Society of America Conference
items.notes: Official RSA conference source to monitor for rhetoric conference calls, institutes, and society opportunities.

items.name: Society for Cinema and Media Studies Conference
items.notes: Official SCMS conference source for cinema and media studies calls. The site may challenge command-line requests, so keep as watch until parser access is reliable.

items.name: Association of Teachers of Technical Writing Conference
items.notes: Official ATTW source for technical writing conference calls and annual meeting information.

items.name: Council for Programs in Technical and Scientific Communication Conference
items.notes: Official CPTSC annual conference source for technical and scientific communication program calls and deadlines.

items.name: ACM SIGDOC Conference
items.notes: Official SIGDOC source for design of communication conferences, calls for papers, and publication-linked proceedings.

items.name: Digital Humanities 2026
items.notes: Official ADHO DH2026 site with CFP, registration, bursary, program, and audiovisual digital humanities conference signals.

items.name: College Art Association Conference
items.notes: Official CAA conference source for visual arts, art history, panels, calls for participation, and graduate-facing conference opportunities.

items.name: Graham Foundation Grants
items.type: Architecture, design, and publication grant source
items.notes: Grant source for architecture, design, publishing, exhibitions, and public humanities-adjacent creative research.

items.name: International Communication Association Conference
items.notes: Official ICA conference source for communication studies, media studies, communication theory, and international communication research. The site may challenge command-line requests.

items.name: IEEE ProComm Conference
items.notes: Official IEEE Professional Communication Society source for ProComm conference calls, technical communication, engineering communication, and professional communication research.

items.name: IEEE Transactions on Professional Communication
items.notes: Official journal source for professional communication, technical communication, engineering communication, information design, and special issue calls.

items.name: Design Research Society Events
items.notes: Design research events source for information design, communication design, design methods, UX, interaction, visual communication, and pedagogy opportunities.

items.name: Design Research Society Conferences
items.notes: Official DRS conference source for design research calls that overlap information design, communication design, interaction, and design pedagogy.

items.name: Philosophy & Rhetoric
items.notes: Rhetoric and philosophy journal source to monitor for special issues, submission updates, and calls in rhetorical theory, argumentation, ethics, and critical theory.

items.name: Technical Communication Quarterly
items.notes: ATTW journal source for technical communication, technical writing, professional writing, content strategy, usability, pedagogy, and special issue calls.

items.name: Communication Design Quarterly
items.notes: SIGDOC publication source for communication design, information design, content strategy, UX, documentation, and design of communication calls.

items.name: Society for Technical Communication Summit
items.notes: Technical communication summit source for practitioner-scholar events, proposal cycles, professional communication, UX, documentation, and content strategy.

items.name: tekom / tcworld Conferences
items.notes: International technical communication conference source for tcworld, tekom, documentation, localization, UX writing, and professional communication.

items.name: International Institute for Information Design Events
items.notes: Information design source for events, workshops, communication design, data visualization, document design, and public information design.

items.name: Information Design Association
items.notes: Information design organization source for field news, events, talks, calls, and publication opportunities.
